//fabrik:cli:flag, //fabrik:cli:argument, and //fabrik:cli:example declared
with a command bind parsed values to the function's plain trailing
parameters by name; the emitted handles, tree fields, and wrapper share the
declarations, and the godoc remainder becomes Long.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26

require github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli v0.1.0

replace github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli => CLIDIR
-- main.go --
package main

import "os"

func main() { os.Exit(run()) }
-- shared/shared.go --
package shared

import (
	"fmt"
	"time"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli"
)

type Store struct{ DSN string }

//fabrik:provider
func NewStore() *Store { return &Store{DSN: "app.db"} }

// Apply pending migrations.
//
// Applies every migration the store has not seen yet.
//
//fabrik:cli:command
//fabrik:cli:flag name=dry-run short=n type=bool help="Print without applying."
//fabrik:cli:flag name=timeout type=duration default=90s help="Per-migration timeout."
//fabrik:cli:flag name=only type=strings help="Apply only the named migrations."
//fabrik:cli:argument name=direction type=string values=up,down default=up help="Migration direction."
//fabrik:cli:example cmd="app migrate up" help="Apply all pending migrations."
func Migrate(ctx cli.Context, store *Store, direction string, dryRun bool, timeout time.Duration, only []string) error {
	fmt.Fprintln(ctx.Stdout(), store.DSN, direction, dryRun, timeout, only)
	return nil
}
-- want/main.gen.go --
// Code generated by fabrik. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate with: fabrik wire

package main

import (
	"context"
	"os"
	"os/signal"
	"syscall"
	"time"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli"

	"app/shared"
)

func run() int {
	ctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())
	defer cancel()
	sigc := make(chan os.Signal, 2)
	signal.Notify(sigc, os.Interrupt, syscall.SIGTERM)
	defer signal.Stop(sigc)
	go func() {
		<-sigc
		cancel()
		<-sigc
		os.Exit(1)
	}()

	migrateDryRun := cli.BoolFlag("dry-run").Short('n').Help("Print without applying.")
	migrateTimeout := cli.DurationFlag("timeout").Default(1*time.Minute + 30*time.Second).Help("Per-migration timeout.")
	migrateOnly := cli.StringSliceFlag("only").Help("Apply only the named migrations.")
	migrateDirection := cli.StringArg("direction").Default("up").OneOf("up", "down").Help("Migration direction.")

	root := &cli.Command{
		Name: "app",
		Subcommands: []*cli.Command{
			{
				Name:  "migrate",
				Help:  "Apply pending migrations",
				Long:  "Applies every migration the store has not seen yet.",
				Flags: cli.Flags(migrateDryRun, migrateTimeout, migrateOnly),
				Args:  cli.Args(migrateDirection),
				Examples: []cli.Example{
					{Cmd: "app migrate up", Help: "Apply all pending migrations."},
				},
				Run: func(ctx cli.Context) error {
					store, err := buildMigrate(ctx)
					if err != nil {
						return err
					}
					return shared.Migrate(ctx, store, migrateDirection.Get(ctx), migrateDryRun.Get(ctx), migrateTimeout.Get(ctx), migrateOnly.Get(ctx))
				},
			},
		},
	}
	return root.Exec(os.Args[1:], cli.WithSignalContext(ctx))
}

func buildMigrate(ctx context.Context) (*shared.Store, error) {
	// Providers
	sharedStore := shared.NewStore()
	return sharedStore, nil
}
